_doc: JUP unlock schedule from defillama.com/unlocks/jupiter. 49.39% unlocked / 50.61% × 10b max = 5.06b JUP locked. DL event panel shows monthly Team + Mercurial Stakeholders cliffs. Pattern: Team 38.89m JUP/month + Mercurial 14.58m JUP/month, with periodic larger Mercurial releases (~78m every ~7 months). Chart shows linear cumulative growth through early 2027 then flatter.

events.note: Team 28.12% × 10b = 2.81b total. Monthly 38.89m × 25mo ≈ 970m, balance plus chart shape suggests ongoing through ~mid-2028.
Mercurial Stakeholders 7.74% × 10b = 774m total. Monthly + periodic larger releases. Encoded as monthly base.
Feb 2026 larger Mercurial release ($13.64m / 1.11% of float). Pattern repeats roughly every 7 months — would need more events for full forecast.
